title: قيم ومبادئ الصحة النفسية للأطفال والمراهقين
reference_info: WHO — Child and Adolescent Mental Health Policies
text_original: 5. Examples of values and principles in child and adolescent mental health Values Principles Protecting and supporting Specific mental health services for children and vulnerable groups in society adolescents should be developed. Considering mental health Child and adolescent mental health services should as indivisible from physical be integrated into general health services. Assuring equity Child and adolescent mental health services should be accessible to everybody, no matter what their socioeconomic status or geographical location. Assuming responsibility for The health system should be oriented towards reducing the prevention of psycho- risk factors for poor mental health and enhancing logical, emotional and protective factors. Promoting healthy Interventions should aim to promote the healthy development development of all children and adolescents Respecting the autonomy Children and adolescents should be involved in of children and adolescents decision- making concerning the development and implementation of services and programmes. * The examples are NOT specific recommendations for action. See boxes 12 and 13 for visions from which these values and principles might emanate, and objectives to which they might give rise. Objectivesare more specific than principles; they refer to the outcomes that the policy hopes to achieve and the manner in which the outcomes will be achieved. They should Objectives are more specific be measurable to allow progress to be monitored and to ensure accountability. WHO than principles, and refer to has defined three objectives for health policies: i) improving the health of the population; what the policy sets out to ii) responding to people’s expectations;
text_simplified: يجب تطوير خدمات خاصة للصحة النفسية للأطفال والمراهقين، ودمجها مع الخدمات الصحية العامة. ينبغي أن تكون هذه الخدمات متاحة للجميع بغض النظر عن وضعهم الاجتماعي أو مكان إقامتهم. كما يجب تعزيز العوامل الوقائية والتركيز على النمو الصحي، مع إشراك الأطفال والمراهقين في اتخاذ القرارات المتعلقة بالخدمات.
